atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right ankle pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right ankle pain following a fall last night

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he slipped on ice and heard a pop

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports initial inability to walk

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he can now put some weight on it

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he is still limping

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as constant and throbbing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as hurting when touched

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he iced and elevated his leg last night

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he took ibuprofen

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he played soccer in high school

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals ecchymosis over the lateral malleolus

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the anterior and lateral soft tissue

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes crutches for support.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes an air cast to stabilize the ankle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to keep the leg elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to continue ice application five times a day for 20 minutes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to encourage offloading of the leg for one to two days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders follow-up in two to three weeks to assess healing and adjust treatment as needed.
